name: Baselime Observability API
what_it_does: Observability platform acquired by Cloudflare, specialized for serverless and edge environments — providing logs, traces, and metrics for AWS Lambda, Cloudflare Workers, and other serverless runtimes with OpenTelemetry support and SQL-based querying.
use_cases: Observability for AWS Lambda functions with automatic instrumentation and cold start tracking
Monitoring Cloudflare Workers with native Cloudflare integration post-acquisition
OpenTelemetry-based distributed tracing for serverless microservices
Querying logs and traces with SQL-like query language for ad-hoc investigation
Real-time alerting on serverless function errors and latency spikes
not_for: Traditional long-running server observability at massive scale (use Datadog or New Relic)
Pure infrastructure metrics without code instrumentation (use Prometheus/Grafana)
Teams not on serverless or edge platforms
best_when: A serverless or Cloudflare Workers team needs native observability with automatic instrumentation, OpenTelemetry support, and SQL-based log querying.
avoid_when: You primarily run traditional servers, VMs, or containers — Baselime's strength is specifically serverless and edge.

auth.notes: API key from dashboard. Bearer token in Authorization header. Workspace-scoped access. No fine-grained scopes. Post-Cloudflare acquisition, auth model may evolve toward Cloudflare account integration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier available; generous for small teams
pricing.paid_tiers: Evolving post-Cloudflare acquisition — pricing being integrated into Cloudflare ecosystem
pricing.notes: Acquired by Cloudflare in 2024. Pricing and product roadmap evolving — may be absorbed into Cloudflare's observability offering. Existing customers may see changes. Good for Cloudflare-heavy architectures but evaluate acquisition trajectory.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for querying logs and traces. OpenTelemetry SDK for instrumentation. Webhook support for alerts. Post-acquisition documentation updates may lag. Product direction uncertain as Cloudflare integration progresses.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Log/trace queries are idempotent reads. Event ingestion creates new records — not idempotent. Alert configuration updates idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Cloudflare acquisition (2024) means product roadmap is uncertain — evaluate alternatives
Specialized for serverless/edge — not suitable for traditional server observability
OpenTelemetry instrumentation required for traces — not zero-config for all runtimes
SQL-like query language has learning curve vs. standard SQL

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant. Cloudflare infrastructure security. API keys only — no OAuth2 scopes. Post-acquisition security posture benefits from Cloudflare's enterprise security practices.
